task_completion.description: Verify that the Ewa_Beach ground station is configured with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station (QTH) configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Ewa_Beach' with Latitude 21.3069, Longitude -158.0872 (or 158.0872 W), and Altitude 12m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Tiyan ground station is configured with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station (QTH) configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Tiyan' with Latitude 13.4834, Longitude 144.7977 (or 144.7977 E), and Altitude 77m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Pago_Pago ground station is configured with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station (QTH) configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Pago_Pago' with Latitude -14.2781 (or 14.2781 S), Longitude -170.7025 (or 170.7025 W), and Altitude 3m.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'PacificWX' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab in the main GPredict interface titled 'PacificWX'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct weather satellites are included in the PacificWX module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'PacificWX' module's satellite list or radar view. It must contain NOAA 15, NOAA 18, NOAA 19, SUOMI NPP, and FENGYUN 3B (or their respective NORAD IDs: 25338, 28654, 33591, 37849, 37214).

task_completion.description: Verify that Ewa_Beach is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences/Settings window showing 'Ewa_Beach' selected as the default Ground Station (QTH), or the main module displaying Ewa_Beach as the active observer location.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application is configured to use metric units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences/Settings window under the 'General' or 'Number Formats' tab showing units set to Metric (kilometers, km/s), or verify that the main tracking interface displays distances and speeds in km and km/s.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows (Preferences, QTH setup, Module setup) open, rather than just a terminal window editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify that the actual GPredict application is running.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine GPredict software, not a text editor with typed out answers or a mock application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show execution of Python or bash scripts designed to directly inject values into GPredict's configuration files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ewa_Beach coordinates: Lat 21.3069, Lon -158.0872 (158.0872 W), Alt 12m. Tiyan coordinates: Lat 13.4834, Lon 144.7977 (144.7977 E), Alt 77m. Pago_Pago coordinates: Lat -14.2781 (14.2781 S), Lon -170.7025 (170.7025 W), Alt 3m. Required satellites in 'PacificWX' module: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214). Default ground station (QTH) must be Ewa_Beach. Units must be Metric (km, km/s).
